title: Income Statement
content:
Revenue
- Cost of Goods Sold
= Gross Profit
- Operating Expenses
= Operating Income
+/- Other Income/Expenses
= Income Before Tax
- Income Tax Expense
= Net Income

title: Balance Sheet
content:
ASSETS
  Current Assets
  Non-Current Assets
LIABILITIES
  Current Liabilities
  Long-Term Liabilities
EQUITY
  Share Capital
  Retained Earnings

title: Statement of Cash Flows
content:
Operating Activities
+ Investing Activities
+ Financing Activities
= Net Change in Cash
+ Beginning Cash
= Ending Cash
